description_long: This police station is a two-story building with a modern, boxy design, featuring a prominent blue vertical sign labeled 'POLICE' at the entrance. The facade combines white and dark gray sections, with large rectangular windows on both floors and a gold shield emblem mounted on the right side. A rooftop helipad marked with an 'H' is visible, suggesting support for aerial operations. The building is accompanied by a black-and-white police car parked at the front, reinforcing its function. Additional details include rooftop HVAC units and a main entrance door beneath the signage. The overall structure is clean, geometric, and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story police station with a blue 'POLICE' sign, rooftop helipad, gold shield emblem, and a police car parked in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue 'POLICE' sign, gold shield emblem, large windows, and a police car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop helipad, rear HVAC units, and the police car partially visible near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the building's geometric structure, window arrangements, and the blue vertical sign extending above the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain facade with two HVAC units and the police car barely visible at the front.
attribute_police_signage: Large vertical blue sign with white 'POLICE' text at the front entrance; gold shield emblem on the right facade.
attribute_police_vehicle_presence: One black-and-white police car parked in front of the building, marked with 'POLICE' and a rooftop light bar.
attribute_building_facade_features: Large rectangular windows, main entrance door, blue vertical 'POLICE' sign, gold shield emblem, rooftop helipad, rooftop HVAC units.
